summary: There is currently no available evidence supporting the effectiveness of MAGE-A3 immunotherapy in non-small-cell lung cancer; standard treatments focus instead on approved immune checkpoints such as PD-1/PD-L1 inhibitors. Despite potential theoretical value of MAGE-A3 as a target, it has not been evaluated clinically in NSCLC based on reviewed studies.
